description_long: This is an adult male pedestrian dressed in casual, urban streetwear. He wears a short-sleeved t-shirt with a large number and text on the back, paired with cropped, patterned pants that feature decorative side elements. His head and lower face are covered by a patterned scarf or keffiyeh, leaving only his eyes visible, suggesting a sense of anonymity or protection. He has a sash or cloth tied around his waist, adding to the layered, eclectic style. His footwear consists of modern athletic sneakers, and his overall appearance is that of a streetwise individual, possibly inspired by contemporary urban or hip-hop fashion. The figure stands in a confident, slightly aggressive posture, with arms slightly bent and fists loosely clenched.
description: An adult male in urban streetwear with a scarf covering his head and face, patterned pants, a sash at the waist, and athletic sneakers.
description_view_0: Front view showing the scarf-covered head and face, red t-shirt, patterned pants, and sash detail at the waist.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the scarf, the layered sash, and the sneaker design.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large number and text on the back of the t-shirt, as well as the full length of the sash and pants pattern.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the scarf's drape, the arm's relaxed position, and the side pattern of the pants.
attribute_clothing_type: casual t-shirt, cropped patterned pants, sash at waist, head and face scarf
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly bent
